title: polypogon monspeliensis var. maritimus
intro: Polypogon monspeliensis var. maritimus, also known as coastal hair grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of coastal hair grass include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against microbial infections. Coastal hair grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
